stories.title: User Login Authentication

statement.iWantTo: log in using my email and password
statement.soThat: I can access my personal dashboard and saved settings safely

acceptanceCriteria:
Given the user is on the login page
When they enter valid credentials
Then they are redirected to the dashboard

Given the user enters an invalid password
When they submit the form
Then an error message is displayed
technicalCriteria: Implement rate limiting on the login endpoint (max 5 attempts per minute)
stories.devNotes: Needs to integrate with the new Auth0 provider.
